revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-8-055

The ratio of the total energy delivered by a source in a given interval of time to the total energy available from the source in the same interval of time.

{{IALAFooter}}
